allow: Bash(python -c "from app.services.tutor_service import tutor_service; print\('OK', tutor_service.is_available\(\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if any\(x in k for x in ['three','fiber','drei','rapier','cannon']\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; keys=['@react-three/fiber','@react-three/drei','three']; [print\(k, deps.get\(k,'MISSING'\)\) for k in keys]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('peerDeps:', d.get\('peerDependencies',{}\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('services/cloud-backend/data/concepts.json'\)\); print\(f'{len\(data\)} concepts:'\); [print\(f'  {c[\\"concept_id\\"]} — {c[\\"title\\"]}'\) for c in data]")

Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('services/cloud-backend/data/concepts.json', encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\(f'{len\(data\)} concepts'\); [print\(f'  {c[\\"concept_id\\"]}'\) for c in data]")
